flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Saint Joseph's University rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($29.1k → $34.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Saint Joseph's University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($47.9k → $53.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Saint Joseph's University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Saint Joseph's University are 47% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($86.9k vs $59.0k).
